title: BRLPS Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 05 MIS Consultant Posts
description: The Bihar Rural Livelihoods Promotion Society (BRLPS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 05 MIS Consultant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, MCA, and M.Sc. can apply for the BRLPS Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection pr...
